validations.logic: All exam slot routes require authenticated staff user.
Assignments require approved/activated and not blocked/suspended school.
Final assignment requires locked student roster.
Final assignment requires finance payment gate passed, waiver or approved credit.
Slot start must be before slot end and inside exam cycle window.
Slot timezone is required and API must use absolute datetimes.
Blackout windows block slot creation/assignment unless approved override.
Assignment cannot exceed capacity unless override approved.
Bulk assignment requires dry-run conflict report.
Reschedule requires target slot capacity check.
Reschedule after material generation requires material impact review.
Slot lock requires no blocking conflicts.
Assignment lock requires candidate IDs from student_roster_ops.
Browser-submitted slot/payment/roster/capacity status is never trusted.
Slot exports require reason and audit.
Exam cycles, slots, assignments and events are archived/cancelled, not hard deleted.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
